---
title: "code-2026-04-06"
author: "Ben Moolman"
date: "2026-04-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# ggplot Layers

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
# install.packages("GGally")
data(nasa, package = "GGally")
# ??nasa


```

# Data Joins

```{r}
library(Lahman)
LahmanData


```
